first_user_message: <local-command-caveat>Caveat: The messages below were generated by the user while running local commands. DO NOT respond to these messages or otherwise consider them in your response unless the user explicitly asks you to.</local-command-caveat>

result.head:
[--context-pct CONTEXT_PCT] [--context-pct-sweep]
                         [--context-pcts CONTEXT_PCTS]
  --context-pct CONTEXT_PCT
  --context-pct-sweep   Run context percentage sweep for dose-response
  --context-pcts CONTEXT_PCTS

tool_calls.command:
cd /Users/ren/IdeaProjects/Paper/ploidy && nohup python experiments/run_diversity_experiment.py --primary claude --secondary codex --repeats 1 > experiments/logs/diversity_claude-vs-codex_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log 2>&1 &
echo "PID: $!"

nohup python experiments/run_diversity_experiment.py --primary gemini --secondary codex --repeats 1 > experiments/logs/diversity_gemini-vs-codex_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log 2>&1 &
echo "PID: $!"

# Exp 1: New Task Simulation — 핵심 비교
nohup python experiments/run_experiment.py --all-long \
    --methods new_task_sim,ploidy,single,second_opinion \
    --effort high \
    > experiments/logs/new_task_sim_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log 2>&1 &
echo "Exp1 PID: $!"

# Exp 2: Context Percentage Dose-Response — long tasks만
nohup python experiments/run_experiment.py --long \
    --methods single,ploidy \
    --context-pct-sweep --context-pcts 0,25,50,75,100 \
    --effort high \
    > experiments/logs/context_pct_sweep_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log 2>&1 &
echo "Exp2 PID: $!"

# P5b만 죽이고 재시작
kill $(ps aux | grep "injection claude_md" | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}') 2>/dev/null
sleep 1
nohup python experiments/run_experiment.py --all-long \
    --methods single,ploidy --injection claude_md \
    --resume experiments/results/20260328_015335_effort-high_lang-en_inj-claude_md \
    > experiments/logs/resume_p5b_debug.log 2>&1 &
echo "PID: $!"; sleep 10; grep "⏳" experiments/logs/resume_p5b_debug.log 2>/dev/null | tail -3

# 누락된 실험 추가 실행
# 1. Short-context baseline (Table 1): 7 short tasks × 9 methods
nohup python experiments/run_experiment.py \
    --methods single,second_opinion,ccr,symmetric,ploidy,self_consistency,sf_passive,sf_active,sf_selective \
    --effort high \
    > experiments/logs/short_context_baseline_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log 2>&1 &
echo "Short-context PID: $!"

# 2. injection=skills (Table 3): 28 tasks × single,ploidy
nohup python experiments/run_experiment.py --all-long \
    --methods single,ploidy \
    --injection skills \
    > experiments/logs/injection_skills_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log 2>&1 &
echo "Skills PID: $!"

# 3. Linguistic ko (Table 10): 3 long tasks × single,sf_active
nohup python experiments/run_experiment.py --long \
    --methods single,sf_active \
    --lang ko \
    > experiments/logs/lang_ko_$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S).log 2>&1 &
echo "Lang-ko PID: $!"

result.head:
Short-context PID: 31658
Skills PID: 31660
Lang-ko PID: 31662

tool_calls.command:
cd /Users/ren/IdeaProjects/Paper/ploidy

# Exp1: 1개 남음 — resume
nohup python experiments/run_experiment.py --all-long \
    --methods new_task_sim,ploidy,single,second_opinion \
    --resume experiments/results/20260328_022121_effort-high_lang-en_inj-raw \
    > experiments/logs/exp1_final.log 2>&1 &
echo "Exp1 PID: $!"

# Skills: 1개 남음 — resume
nohup python experiments/run_experiment.py --all-long \
    --methods single,ploidy --injection skills \
    --resume experiments/results/20260328_072744_effort-high_lang-en_inj-skills \
    > experiments/logs/skills_final.log 2>&1 &
echo "Skills PID: $!"
